title: Spring Server for UCust Startup
description: This dual-token authentication backend was written for the startup UCast. It's my first server using a dual-token authentication system with a long-lived refresh token (in the browser cookie) and a short-lived access token (in the request body), which, after its lifetime expires, must be refreshed using the refresh token via the /refresh endpoint.
